title: Open Godot MCP

git_warning_in_repo: Config file is inside a git repo and NOT in .gitignore.
git_warning_help: API keys may be committed accidentally. Move the file outside the repo or add it to .gitignore manually.

config_dir_help: Config stored in your home folder, outside any project repo.
